purpose: Engagement baseline for comparing pivot week (2026-06-08 to 06-14) against. Pivot is a tracked experiment; this is the control.
format_system: Pillow branded cards — infographic / photo-heading / question-card / cta-card. NOT the pivot's text-carousel / listicle / carousel.

format_pivot_contrast.baseline: Pillow branded-card system (infographic, photo-heading, question-card, cta-card)
format_pivot_contrast.pivot: Winning niche archetypes from Lab (text-only myth-bust, listicle, carousel, stat-drop carousel)

pillar_rotation: Mon=Education · Tue=Trust · Wed=Education · Thu=Engagement · Fri=Education · Sat=Trust · Sun=Conversion (locked across all baseline weeks)

2026-05-18.topic: CGM 'healthy breakfast' spikes — what TikTok misses about insulin
Postpartum depletion — bigger than iron and B12
Eczema food triggers — gut-skin axis, beyond elimination diets
Migraine triggers — hormonal, glycaemic, gut-driven, mitochondrial
Sleep apnea in women — looks like anxiety, insomnia, jaw clenching
Long COVID mitochondria — post-exertional malaise, not burnout

2026-05-25.topic: Why you catch every winter bug — the immune workup behind 'always sick'
Brain fog has real drivers, not 'just stress'
Which winter shift do you notice first?
How your gut and bile clear estrogen
Stealth mould — the home question most people don't expect
A 'normal' liver test isn't always all-clear

2026-06-01.topic: Gallbladder gone, gut chaos in — bile acid diarrhoea
Mouth-taping went viral last year, I've been saying it for 13 years
Reflux from low stomach acid, not high — the PPI paradox
Air hunger isn't always anxiety — sigh-frequency as a clinical sign
Endometriosis isn't just period pain — gut and immune disease
Low-dose naltrexone — the real clinic picture vs the Reddit hype
Slow caffeine metaboliser — CYP1A2 / MyDNA pharmacogenomics

measurement_notes: Pipeline pulls engagement (likes, comments, shares) per-platform from Zernio for all 3 baseline weeks using the same method as pivot week (2026-06-08 to 06-14). Baseline = control arm. Pivot must beat baseline to justify making the format system permanent; if pivot underperforms, branded cards resume.
decision_log: Permanent pivot decision (commit vs rollback) is Rohan's call, logged in decisions/log.md. Measurement informs it; does not make it.
